parameters.content:
## NOMAAD Camp · Quote → PDF → Email

**Setup checklist (do this once after import):**

1. **Webhook** node — copy the production URL and paste it into `main.js` (`N8N_WEBHOOK_URL`).
2. **Sheets · Read counter** + **Sheets · Append log** — connect a Google Sheets credential, point to a sheet named **NOMAAD Quote Log** with columns A–Q (see SETUP.md).
3. **HTTP · Browserless** — replace `YOUR_BROWSERLESS_TOKEN` in the URL with your real token from browserless.io.
4. **Gmail · Customer** + **Gmail · Internal** — connect a Gmail credential. Update the internal recipients (BCC).
5. Activate the workflow.

**Test:** submit a real quote on nomaadcamp.com — the PDF should arrive in the customer inbox + the team gets a notification.

nodes.name: Sheets · Read counter
nodes.notes: Reads the Quote Log sheet so the Code node can compute the next quote number. Map credentials after import.

nodes.name: Code · Render HTML
nodes.notes: Reads max(counter) from Sheets node above, generates NC-YYYY-NNNN, fills the HTML template, and prepares all email bodies. No edit needed unless you change the design.

nodes.name: HTTP · Browserless PDF
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_BROWSERLESS_TOKEN with your token. Free tier covers 1,000 PDF/month.

nodes.name: Gmail · Customer
nodes.notes: Wraps the PDF as attachment 'data' (binary from Browserless). Skip if email empty by adding an IF node before.

nodes.name: Gmail · Internal
nodes.notes: Add Б.Дэлгэрбат + Н.Анужин emails to BCC after import.
